perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair and heavy makeup, wearing a pink sequined top, is shown in a close-up shot. She is touching her right cheek with her index finger and looking into the camera with a slight smile. A social media comment overlay is centered on the screen. (2) She moves her hand away slightly and begins speaking or mouthing words to the camera with a playful, expressive facial movement, maintaining direct eye contact with the viewer.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and energetic electronic background music begins. (2) A female voice speaks a short, loud sentence in a sharp tone using a local dialect (Taiwanese Hokkien). (3) The audio cuts off along with the music as the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative/Hook Text: A comment interface showing a user 'wang.12' saying '感冒聲音好好聽 XD' (The cold/hoarse voice sounds very good XD) accompanied by an orange mascot sticker. The tone is humorous and complimentary.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator visible in close-up.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long black hair, wearing a sparkly pink sequined top, featuring prominent facial makeup.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A plain, bright indoor wall background, slightly out of focus.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The creator is using a specific fan comment about her 'sick voice' as a prompt to record a short, sassy, or playful reaction video. It leverages her vocal quality (possibly hoarse due to a cold) to build engagement and showcase her personality.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Close-up selfie angle, sparkly outfit, use of local dialect slang.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Short-form vertical video optimized for social media platforms like TikTok or Instagram Reels, focusing on creator-fan interaction.
